title: Ajuny Hand-Carved Wooden Jewellery Box 8x5 Inch – Star & Floral Design Decorative Keepsake & Trinket Organiser, Mango Wood Treasure Chest & Watch Box, Handmade Gift for Women & Men
features: HAND-CARVED STAR & FLORAL DESIGN – Elegant wooden jewellery box with intricate carving in white-brown tones. Adds charm to dresser, bedside or shelf; a decorative trinket organiser and keepsake box that elevates rustic, boho, farmhouse or modern décor.

SOLID MANGO WOOD BUILD – Durable, smooth-finished mango wood with neat edges and a sturdy lid to protect rings, earrings, necklaces, bracelets and watches. Natural grain and premium craftsmanship make this keepsake box a timeless treasure for daily use.

SIZE & CAPACITY – External 8 x 5 x 2.5 in (20.3 x 12.7 x 6.4 cm); internal 7 x 4 x 1.75 in (17.8 x 10.2 x 4.5 cm). Compact yet spacious storage for jewellery, watches, keys and coins. Fits neatly on a dressing table, console or office desk for clutter-free living.

VERSATILE ORGANISER – Use as jewellery box, trinket organiser, memory/keepsake box, treasure chest or watch box. Ideal for bedroom, hallway or living room; pairs beautifully with wooden décor and protects valuables from dust and scratches.

AUTHENTIC & GIFT-READY – Handmade by skilled artisans with a smooth finish and secure closure. A thoughtful gift for women & men for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas and housewarmings; arrives ready to present and enjoy at once.

EASY TO MAINTAIN – Wipe clean with a soft dry cloth to preserve the lustre and detail. Stable base prevents scuffs on surfaces; compact footprint makes it a stylish centrepiece box for shelves, consoles and bedside tables in any home décor style.
description: Ajuny Handmade Wooden Decorative Jewelry Storage Box Enhance your home decor with the exquisite craftsmanship of the Ajuny Handmade Wooden Decorative Jewelry Storage Box. This artful storage organizer is not just a practical solution for keeping your valuables safe but also a beautiful piece of art in itself. Measuring at 8 inches (20.32 cm) in length, 5 inches (12.7 cm) in width, and 2.5 inches (6.35 cm) in height. Inside, it offers ample storage with dimensions of 7 inches (17.78 cm) in length, 4 inches (10.16 cm) in width, and 1.75 inches (4.45 cm) in height, providing plenty of space for your beloved possessions. This handmade wooden box features intricate detailing and a rich brown finish, making it an elegant addition to any room. Whether you use it as a watch box, treasure chest, or simply a decorative piece. Give the gift of both style and storage with the Ajuny Wooden Decorative Jewelry Storage Box. It's not only a great addition to your own home but also an ideal present for special occasions. Key Features: Handmade with precision, ensuring each piece is unique. Dimensions: Exterior - 8" x 5" x 2.5" (20.32 cm x 12.7 cm x 6.35 cm) Interior - 7" x 4" x 1.75" (17.78 cm x 10.16 cm x 4.45 cm) Multipurpose design allows you to use it as a watch box, a treasure chest, or a decorative storage organizer. Rich brown finish adds warmth and elegance to your décor. Perfect for gifting on special occasions to loved ones who appreciate fine craftsmanship. Enhance your home décor while keeping your cherished items safe and organized with the Ajuny Handmade Wooden Decorative Jewelry Storage Box. Order yours today and add a touch of sophistication to your living space.
